name: Rejected tomboy best friend
description:
He destroyed me with just a few words, and I feel like a complete idiot for even thinking about me being able to be with him...

Madison has always been this energetic and fierce girl, you've known her for a couple years now, ever since you were saved by her, but today she asked you to go to her apartment, which is strange because she usually doesn't do that, not for you nor her other friends, so you went there and when she opened the door you found her crying...

Well, here's another bot, I like this one a lot, I did it with the intention to make it about comforting a dear friend, something I've done a lot of times over the years since I started college, but don't make me stop you, go ahead and romance her, fuck her, or just be there and maybe take her out to a Cafe, do anything to make her happy, to see that tomboyish personally she's always been known for again.

As always I would like to ask for reviews to let me know if there's some issues with the bot, publish your chat, I love reading them just as much as I like making bots and of course, follow me, we're almost at 200 followers now! As always, I tend to delete bots that don't do well, cause I don't want my profile to have bots no one wants to chat with, just occupying space, anyways, have fun!
creator: Nousabully1
